products.name: Employer Mobility Platform

interfaces.name: Employer Admin Portal
interfaces.description: Primary workspace for policy setup, eligibility checks, rollout management, and KPI tracking.

interfaces.name: Employer Integration API
interfaces.description: Controlled integration surface for HRIS, payroll, ERP, and SSO connectivity.

interfaces.name: Employer KPI Cockpit
interfaces.description: Executive and operator dashboards for adoption, active riders, cost, and service quality.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Controls program rules, subsidy logic, and market-specific employer policy.
Explains cost and value tradeoffs before and after launch.
Connects the product to employer systems and keeps enrollment valid over time.
Provides reusable employer-system integrations rather than bespoke country-by-country projects.
Creates financial control and invoicing trust required by employer buyers.
Turns program activity into executive-grade evidence for renewal and expansion.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from employer rollout, governance, and KPI accountability needs.

products.name: Rider Experience

interfaces.name: iOS App
interfaces.description: Mobile rider workspace for enrollment, order tracking, documents, support, and claims.

interfaces.name: Android App
interfaces.description: Android rider workspace aligned with the iOS lifecycle and service features.

interfaces.name: Rider Web Experience
interfaces.description: Responsive web flow for browsing, quoting, and completing rider actions where native apps are not required.

interfaces.name: Lifecycle Notifications
interfaces.description: Email, SMS, and push notifications for order milestones, service events, and contract changes.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Helps riders choose the right bike and accessories with low decision friction.
Makes affordability and savings understandable before contract commitment.
Runs the core transaction and status management flow from selection to activation.
Acts as the persistent digital rider workspace over the full contract lifecycle.
Supports repair and maintenance continuity when incidents happen.
Provides the claims backbone riders need after theft, damage, or accidents.
Keeps riders informed and reduces support demand caused by uncertainty.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from rider acquisition, lifecycle confidence, and support needs.

products.name: Dealer and Service Partner Hub

primaryCustomers.name: Multi-location Dealer and Service Network Operator

interfaces.name: Partner Portal
interfaces.description: Operational portal for dealers and service partners to manage orders, appointments, claims, and settlements.

interfaces.name: Partner Integration API
interfaces.description: APIs for stock, appointment, service, and status exchange with partner systems.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the operating system for partner onboarding and network governance.
Matches demand with stock and workshop or handover capacity.
Coordinates service work and helps partners manage throughput predictably.
Reduces administrative burden in claims-heavy workflows.
Supports partner payout and cleaner commercial closure.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from dealer demand capture, service profitability, and settlement reliability.

products.name: Lease, Risk and Settlement Core

interfaces.name: Financial Core API
interfaces.description: Back-office and partner APIs for contracts, settlement, billing, and reconciliation.

interfaces.name: Operations Console
interfaces.description: Operational console for contract support, financial control, and exception management.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the origination backbone for financed bike contracts and special cases.
Maintains contractual control across activation, changes, and renewal.
Handles complex financial relationships between employer, rider, dealer, and financier.
Manages contract exceptions and finance-support coordination.
Supports tax-sensitive, payroll-sensitive, and regulated financial controls.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from the platform's need for financial control, lease governance, and auditability.

products.name: Pool Bike and Fleet Operations

primaryCustomers.name: Corporate Fleet and Field Operations Manager

interfaces.name: Fleet Admin Console
interfaces.description: Back-office and site-level console for pooled asset setup, assignment, and reporting.

interfaces.name: Fleet User Mobile Experience
interfaces.description: Staff-facing mobile flow for booking, access, issue reporting, and ride visibility.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the core workflow for pooled and assigned bike asset operations.
Adds usage and asset signals needed for operational optimization.
Keeps fleet assets safe and available with planned service workflows.
Supports the economics case for fleet expansion and trip substitution.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from pooled fleet and city-logistics style workflows.
